note: Classic (Base Set) near-duplicate drops. The dataset Base Set is a pre-merged union of US/UK/CA/AU editions; each group keeps one card (best-edited/US text, or the original joke). Judgment calls 2026-07-20: localized hate-group family trimmed to The KKK; both Kim Jong cards, both Putin variants, both condom-flavor jokes, plain Glenn Beck, and Hot/White people kept as distinct jokes. Applied to the classic deck only, after FIXES.
